name: Change Game State
desc: Changes a global game state (rain, gamemode, credits, demo message).
notes: Reason codes: 0=invalid bed, 1=end rain, 2=begin rain, 3=change gamemode, 4=credits, 5=demo, 6=arrow, 7=fade, 8=elderGuardian.

implementation.overview: Game state change (rain, gamemode, credits, demo). Modules: NoRain (cancel rain start), AutoGG (detect game end via credits), AntiDemo.

modules.name: NoRain
